_publications._publicationTitle: Development of 3D culture models of plexiform neurofibroma and initial application for phenotypic characterization and drug screening

_contextSnippet: All NF1 PN cell lines tested had significantly higher ability to degrade collagen IV...than control SCs
details: All NF1 PN cell lines showed significantly elevated collagen IV proteolysis compared to wild-type Schwann cells, quantified by DQ-collagen IV fluorescein assay (25 μg/ml added to matrix prior to layering); proteolytic signal normalized to cellular structure volume or cell number; suggests higher invasive potential of NF1 PN cells
